name: The Burgess Principle — Iris
description: Phone-first sovereign advocate PWA for generating, signing, saving, and exporting Burgess Claims offline, with optional Mirror Mode for local identity workflows.

shortcuts.name: Mirror claim
shortcuts.description: Open Iris and start a Mirror Mode-aware Burgess claim flow on this device.

shortcuts.name: Crypto exchange freeze
shortcuts.description: Start a Burgess Claim for an exchange freeze or withdrawal hold.

shortcuts.name: Direct debit refund
shortcuts.description: Start a Burgess Claim for a direct debit refund dispute.

shortcuts.name: Benefits review
shortcuts.description: Start a Burgess Claim for a benefits review or dispute.
